diagrams.title: Adjacency Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: Shows n×n matrix layout with row and column indices representing vertices
elements: Cell (i,j) represents edge between vertex i and j

diagrams.title: Undirected Graph - Symmetric Matrix
diagrams.description: Shows 4-vertex undirected graph with symmetric adjacency matrix
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing symmetry property of undirected graphs

diagrams.title: Directed Graph - Asymmetric Matrix
diagrams.description: Shows directed graph with asymmetric (non-symmetric) adjacency matrix

diagrams.title: Weighted Graph Matrix
diagrams.description: Shows weighted graph with weights stored in matrix

diagrams.title: Dense vs Sparse Comparison
diagrams.description: Compares dense graph (almost full matrix) with sparse graph (mostly zeros)
elements: Shows when matrix vs list is preferred
